LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302 - DEFENDANT REN LEI CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC.'S SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION IS DENIED. LAYING TILE IN A SAN FRANCISCO HOME, REN LEI'S EMPLOYEES TROWELED ADHESIVE MUD ONTO A SITE AND LEFT IT UNATTENDED WITHOUT A WARNING SIGN OR CORDON. INTERIOR DESIGNER CHARISE ROSENTHAL ALLEGES SHE STEPPED ON THE SLIPPERY MUD, ALMOST FELL AND WAS INJURED. SHE SUED REN LEI FOR NEGLIGENCE. THE REN LEI MOTION'S ONLY ARGUMENTS ARE THAT (1) IT DID NOT BREACH ITS DUTY NOT TO CREATE UNREASONABLE RISK OF HARM BY LEAVING THE SITE UNATTENDED "FOR FIVE MINUTES" AND (2) THE SITE WAS "OPEN AND OBVIOUS." HOWEVER, TRIABLE ISSUES EXIST ON BOTH POINTS. WHETHER IT IS APPROPRIATE TO LEAVE TILE MUD UNATTENDED WITHOUT WARNING FOR ANY TIME IS DISPUTED. (OSS PP. 15-16.) WHETHER OR NOT THE SITE'S COLOR, TEXTURE, LIGHTING AND HEIGHT DIFFERENTIAL MADE IT LESS THAN OPEN AND OBVIOUS IS LIKEWISE DISPUTED. (OSS P. 38.) NO SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance is made in this matter.

On calendar for hearing:
DEFENDANT REN LEI CONSTRUCTION CO. INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Ren Lei Construction Company, Inc.'s summary judgment motion is denied.

Laying tile in a San Francisco home, Ren Lei's employees troweled adhesive mud onto a site and left it unattended without a warning sign or cordon. Interior designer Charise Rosenthal alleges she stepped on the slippery mud, almost fell and was injured. She sued Ren Lei for negligence.

The Ren Lei motion's only arguments are that (1) it did not breach its duty not to create unreasonable risk of harm by leaving the site unattended "for five minutes" and (2) the site was "open and obvious." However, triable issues exist on both points. Whether it is appropriate to leave tile mud unattended without warning for any time is disputed. (OSS pp. 15-16.) Whether or not the site's color, texture, lighting and height differential made it less than open and obvious is likewise disputed. (OSS p. 38.)

No sanctions are awarded.

Written order is signed.
